description: This file defines Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) related to 'CorrectiveAction' in the backend API. It includes response structures, create/update request structures, and a helper record for ID and name pairing.

classes.name: CorrectiveActionResponse
classes.description: A DTO record for responding with details of a corrective action.

classes.name: IdName
classes.description: A simple DTO record pairing an ID with a name, used within CorrectiveActionResponse.

classes.name: CreateCorrectiveActionRequest
classes.description: A DTO record capturing information needed to create a new corrective action, with validation annotations.

classes.name: UpdateCorrectiveActionRequest
classes.description: A DTO record capturing information needed to update an existing corrective action, with validation annotations.

methods.name: from
methods.description: A static method in CorrectiveActionResponse that creates a DTO instance from a CorrectiveAction domain object.
